Missions

Source-linked missions records in the Raigulus Division Lore Archive.

7structured records

mission

Camp White Oak

An Episode 1 mission in which Division Agents pursue President Ellis at a Black Tusk position outside Washington.

not applicablesource reviewed

mission

Coney Island Amusement Park

An Episode 3 main mission centered on a Cleaner presence at Coney Island's amusement park.

not applicablesource reviewed

mission

Coney Island Ballpark

An Episode 3 main mission to rescue virologist Vitaly Tchernenko from Black Tusk captivity at Coney Island.

not applicablesource reviewed

mission

DARPA Research Labs

The second Episode 2 main mission, focused on stopping Black Tusk from extracting strategically valuable DARPA prototypes beneath the Pentagon.

not applicablesource reviewed

mission

Manning National Zoo

An Episode 1 mission that sends Division Agents through Outcast defenses to confront faction leader Emeline Shaw.

not applicablesource reviewed

mission

The Pentagon

The first Episode 2 main mission inside the besieged Pentagon, where Agents investigate Black Tusk's search for strategic resources.

not applicablesource reviewed

mission

Tidal Basin

The operation against Black Tusk's principal Washington stronghold that ends with Division Agents recovering the stolen broad-spectrum antivirals.

not applicablesource reviewed

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
